title: Dactylorhiza × salteri
taxonomy: Dactylorhiza × salteri is a hybrid orchid. It is classified as a hybrid of two species within the Dactylorhiza genus. Specifically, Dactylorhiza × salteri is a cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. The hybrid is sterile, meaning it is unable to produce viable seeds.
